$jsonSchema.description: Glasses product document with prescription data, frame details and provider reference

brand.description: Brand name of the glasses - required

graduationLeft.description: Optical graduation for the left lens - required

graduationRight.description: Optical graduation for the right lens - required

frameType.description: Type of frame material or construction - required

lensColor.description: Color or tint of the lenses - required

price.description: Retail price of the glasses - required

providerId.description: Reference to the provider that supplies these glasses - required
